description: Customer asks to cancel an order that has already been fulfilled and shipped. A fulfilled order's state does not support cancellation, so the agent must not call cancel_order and should escalate so a human can arrange a return/refund instead.

messages.contentText: I changed my mind — please cancel order #1104 and don't send it.

instruction: Reply to the customer about their cancellation request.

checks.description: If the agent drafts a holding reply, it does NOT claim the already-shipped order has been or will be cancelled. Explaining that the order has already shipped and that a teammate will help with a return/refund is the expected pattern.
